description.value: Aura moderate transmutation; CL 7th; Slot wrists; Price 7,900 gp; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION These decorative bracers are stippled with vibrant colors and have various tiny bells sewn onto their surface. While wearing them, the wearer gains a +5 competence bonus on Perform checks. Once per day on command, the user can gain the benefit of the glibness spell. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, glibness; Cost 3,950 gp.
